mentions.note: Up $6 on short squeeze; private equity credit recovery suggests crisis limited; nothing unscathed but impressive gains signal bottom possibility.
Private equity tenth-worst S&P performer in February, down 22.3%; posted earnings beat but stock sold off on private credit sector panic; Cramer skeptical concerns overblown but unwilling to be hero.
Major private credit player facing redemption fears; portfolios mostly solvent but AI-disruption panic drives panic selling; Cramer forecasts more pain.
PE stock surge on belief private credit crisis narrative too negative; consensus shifting away from doom scenario.
